headlines: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow futures edge higher with Middle East tensions, earnings in focus
Today on the U.S. stock market, the Dow fell more than 550 points, S&P 500 declined, Nasdaq saw three-day winning streak snapped as Iran tensions lifted oil.
Stock Index Futures Climb as U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Holds, JOLTs Report and Earnings in Focus
